name: Park Elektrik Uretim Madencilik Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Park Elektrik √É¬úretim Madencilik Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S., through its subsidiary, Konya Ilgin Elektrik √É¬úretim Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S., generates and sells electricity in Turkey. It focuses on establishing a thermal power plant with an installed capacity of 500MW in the Ilgin District of Konya. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Park Elektrik √É¬úretim Madencilik Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. is a subsidiary of Park Holding A.S.
